smg.text: Overcast. Showers, heavy at times. Showers will ease off later. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
